problem id: a7dcc027
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(1) XOR NOT SHL(3)

examples:
  10001110 -> 10010011
  00110111 -> 00101001
  00001100 -> 10000111
  10000111 -> 11001001
  10101000 -> 11101111
  11110001 -> 10010101
  01111000 -> 11001111
  00111000 -> 01001111
  11101001 -> 01100101

query: 10111010
predicted answer: 01011011
